errors.description: The policy pack failed deterministic validation before simulation.
errors.fail_closed_reason: Simulation cannot preview runtime behavior from an invalid policy pack.

errors.description: The request tenant or environment is outside policy scope.
errors.fail_closed_reason: Out-of-scope policy simulation could imply cross-tenant or wrong-environment authorization.

errors.description: Allow and deny policies match the same request.
errors.fail_closed_reason: Conflicting policy matches make the preview ambiguous.

errors.description: The preview requires explicit human review before runtime enforcement.
errors.fail_closed_reason: High-risk or human-review policies cannot be auto-approved.

errors.description: No deterministic allow rule matched or the simulation defaulted to fail closed.
errors.fail_closed_reason: Unknown or unmatched policy decisions deny by default.
